action.reasoning: Observation: Training partially succeeded (loss from 4.6→2.5, val_acc~0.47 on noisy val) but crashed on NameError (sys not imported in train.py); checkpoint likely not saved; no eval score yet. Analysis: Simple ResNet50+ImageNet pretrain+aug works as baseline for noisy CIFAR-100N but needs fix for end-to-end; cleanlab available for future noise correction iterations. Decision: Fix import+print in train.py (add sys, remove file=sys.stderr for simplicity), rerun identical 5-epoch training to produce checkpoint, then submit_eval immediately for clean test accuracy baseline and iteration timing (~1min).
